etymology.description: semantic: 衤(衤) (yī, "clothing") + phonetic: 因(因) (yīn)
etymology.interpretation: 裀(裀) (yīn, "mat") combines the semantic component 衤(衤) (yī, "clothing") indicating a textile item, with 因(因) (yīn) providing the phonetic element. The character refers to a cloth mat, suggesting a piece of fabric for a specific use.
